items.name: Steampunk Hoverboard
items.description: At long last, you can harness the mighty power of steam to give you the power of flight. Well more like the power to float close to the ground, but at high speeds. Ok well, high-ish speeds. It's definitely faster than walking.

items.name: Nonmagic Carpet
items.description: This carpet used to be magic.  You bought it at a rug shop from a crying salesman because the situation was really awkward... Still it's cool to think that princesses and tigers used to fly around on this thing you just walk on when you enter the foyer.

items.name: iLift Two
items.description: Next time someone asks - "Do you even lift?"  You can let them know exactly how much you lift... with iLift Two.  Click to spin the dumbbells around- charging them for your deadly throw.  Damage ranges between 10-20 per hit.

items.name: Protest Sign: We Want User GUIs Now!
items.description: User GUIs will revolutionize ROBLOX and we don't want to wait another single day before we can play with them. If you don't agree, we will beat you into submission with rational pro/con discussions, so you might as well give us what we want right now.

items.name: Potato Cannon
items.description: Cloudy with a chance of raw potatoes? Hurl potatoes through the sky to stun your foes!

items.name: Steelshanks Armament
items.description: Pirates don't fight fair. They bring guns to sword fights.

items.name: Vuvuzela
items.description: Annoy soccer player, soccer fans, or pretty much anyone else with this Vuvuzela.

items.name: Staff of Eggstra Large Eggs
items.description: Summon a giant flaming egg from the sky which will crash down and fling your foe far from his current location.

items.name: Super Stomp Boots
items.description: Click a target and BAM - you've jumped there.  If the object is another player, they will take quite a bit of damage from the strike of  your lead Super Stomp Boots.

items.name: Enchanted Bat Flying Potion
items.description: Soar above your opponents with this epic bat potion.

items.name: Deluxe Vine Staff
items.description: Call forth a circle of vines from the earth.  If your foes hit them they will do 20 damage.

items.name: HotThoth's Voodoo Doll
items.description: Created in his own image, this cuddly doll is enchanted with some ancient magic. Only given to his special apprentices, this doll uses its magic to help its wielder, by increasing health, increasing movement speed and firing fireballs/ice shards at the wielder's enemies

items.name: Pot Of Gold
items.description: The end of the rainbow?

items.name: Laser Electrocutor Blade
items.description: The electric blade works like a normal sword most of the time.... but sometimes it sends out a deadly shock!

items.name: Flaming Hedgehog Cannon
items.description: Because laser guns are way too predictable...

items.name: Deluxe Coil Gun
items.description: With lightning in your hand, the future is yours! Shoot electric blue beams of electricity at enemies. Deals 15 damage per hit and stuns enemies for a moment!

items.name: Megaphone
items.description: Yeah! Blah blah blah!  Weeoooo weeeooo! WHHHHHATT?

items.name: Flak Cannon
items.description: Designed for advanced players, this weapon is extremely powerful if you get the timing just right.  Mess it up?  You might just end up with a wipe out.

items.name: Throwing Bolts
items.description: Being struck by lightning is a shocking experience.

items.name: Tornado Summoner
items.description: Summon the might of the air and unleash a wave of cyclones on anyone near you.  When these gale force winds are summoned close to foes, they're sure to be blown away!

items.name: Retro Candy
items.description: Put your enemies to sleep with six pieces of this delicious retro candy.

items.name: Trololololo Wand
items.description: Turn your enemies into trolls!  They'll be slower and very confused!

items.name: Monster Friend
items.description: Monster friend or monster fiend?

items.name: Korblox: Tripmine
items.description: These ghastly mines were invented by the Korbloxians to trap anyone and everyone brave enough to ever venture out into the wilds.

items.name: Saw Sword
items.description: Those trees had it coming!

items.name: Staff of Shifting Polarity
items.description: When you use the Staff of Shifting Polarity, all near by players are pulled to the nearest object.  This force is unstoppable!

items.name: Sword of the Winter Winds
items.description: Harsh and cold just like the winter winds...

items.name: 2010 Roman Candle
items.description: Happy New Years!

items.name: Ghost Hoverboard
items.description: Finally- the future I was promised is here!  Hoverboards!  Because ghosts are too cool to skateboard.

items.name: Hedgehog Friend
items.description: Why can't they just share the hedge?
